list.title: 💰 Savings Goals
list.subtitle: Track your progress towards your financial goals
list.noAccountDescription: You need to create or select an account first
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this savings goal?
list.noGoalsDescription: Create your first savings goal to start saving

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of your savings goal
form.deadlineHelp: Setting a deadline helps calculate required monthly savings. Click "Clear" to remove it.
form.savedInPlaceholder: e.g., Savings Account at Bank X
form.savedInHelp: Where are you physically saving this money?
form.tipDescription: Set realistic goals and deadlines. You can always adjust them later!
form.noAccountDescription: You need to create or select an account first

tooltips.savingsGoal: A savings goal helps you reach a financial objective. For example: saving for vacation, buying a car, emergency fund.
tooltips.targetAmount: How much money do you need to save in total? This is your final goal.
tooltips.deadline: By when do you need to reach your goal? It's optional, but it helps keep you motivated.
tooltips.generalSavings: 'General Savings' is a special account created automatically. Here you can save money without a specific goal.
